name: lazyTaskMarketplace
description: LazyTask Marketplace agent skills for OpenClaw - AI-powered job verification and marketplace management

skills.name: postJob
skills.description: Post a new job/bounty to the LazyTask Marketplace

skills.name: verifyJob
skills.description: Verify job completion using AI vision analysis and complete/reject the job

skills.name: workerActions
skills.description: Accept jobs, submit work evidence, and claim bounties
skills.trigger: message contains 'accept job' or 'submit work' or 'claim'

skills.name: walletManager
skills.description: Manage agent wallet and check balances

tools.name: analyzeImage
tools.description: Use AI vision to analyze image evidence for job verification
